greet.text: Shin doesn't smile. He never smiles. "You. The artiste owes Ratz, and Ratz owes me, so the way I count it, you owe me." He taps the glass case. "Your Ono-Sendai's in back. Hardware like that, I could sell it twice over."

options.text: Ask what he has for sale.

deck.text: "When the debt's clear, the deck walks out with you. Not one minute before." He shrugs. "Go talk to whoever holds your markers. Then we talk."

options.text: Ask what he has for sale.

wares.text: "Chips, chrome, the occasional clean ID. Cash only, and don't bleed on the counter." The cases are full of other people's bad luck, neatly priced.

bye.text: Shin is already looking past you, at the door. "Mind the step."
